secret_key.description: Paystack secret key (sk_...). Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: Paystack API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; sent as the `from` filter on a fresh sync with no persisted cursor.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
